S2GO MEMSMIC IM69D

Boards with two high-performance digital MEMS microphones and ready to use Arduino library

Distributors Inventory for

Infineon's Shield2Go boards provide a unique customer and evaluation experience, featuring two High-performance digital MEMS Microphones IM69D130 and a ready-to-use Arduino library. Customers can develop their system solutions by combining Shield2Go boards with Infineon My IoT adapters, which serve as gateways to external hardware solutions like Arduino and Raspberry PI, expediting the evaluation and development of IoT systems.

Features

  • Dynamic range of 105dB
  • Signal to noise ratio of 69dB(A) SNR
  • <1% total harmonic distortions up to 128 dBSPL
  • Acoustic overload point at 130dBSPL
  • Sensitivity (±1dB) and phase(±2° @1kHz) matched
  • Flat frequency response with low-frequency roll-off at 28Hz
  • Very fast analog to digital conversion speed (6µs latency @1kHz)
  • Power optimized modes determined by PDM clock frequency
  • Omnidirectional pickup pattern
  • 2x IM69D130 Digital MEMS microphone in stereo mode configuration
  • Interface to Infineon My IoT adapters
  • PDM and I2S output configuration
  • Flexibility to develop a custom application with Arduino and Raspberry PI

Applications
